title: ⚡🔥 SALES REPRESENTATIVE 🔥
description:
Entry Level | Training Provided | Performance-Based | Uncapped
Earnings

⚠️ READ BEFORE APPLYING

This is not a fixed-salary comfort job.

This role is for people who want:

Faster income growth

Real skill development

Clear career progression

Recognition based on results

If you are just ORD, a fresh graduate, or considering a career switch, this could be your starting point.

👥 WHO THIS ROLE IS FOR

This position is suitable for:

Fresh graduates with little or no experience

ORD personnel ready to enter the workforce

Career switchers stuck in low-growth roles

Individuals who are hungry, coachable, and driven

👉 Background doesn’t matter. Attitude does.

💼 WHAT YOU WILL DO

You will be trained to:

Engage and communicate confidently with customers

Understand customer needs and recommend solutions

Present products professionally

Handle objections and follow up effectively

Work as part of a results-driven team

This role builds confidence, communication, and sales skills that last a lifetime.

🎓 TRAINING PROVIDED (NO EXPERIENCE NEEDED)

We provide:

Structured onboarding

Step-by-step sales training

Product and communication coaching

Daily guidance from experienced leaders

👉 You are not expected to know everything.

👉 You are expected to learn and improve.

💰 INCOME STRUCTURE

Performance-based commissions

Uncapped earnings

High performers are rewarded more

Your income grows as your skills grow

This role rewards effort and consistency, not seniority.

📈 CAREER PROGRESSION

Clear advancement pathway:

Sales Representative

Senior Sales

Team Leader

Management roles

Promotion is based on performance and leadership, not time served.

✈️ TRAVEL & INCENTIVES

Local and overseas travel opportunities

Incentive trips for top performers

Exposure beyond a desk-bound role

All opportunities are earned through performance.

🎉 TEAM CULTURE

Supportive and driven environment

Team nights and bonding sessions

Recognition for results and improvement

Leaders who coach and guide

You grow faster when surrounded by the right people.

🚫 THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF

You want guaranteed income without effort

You dislike performance-based work

You avoid challenges or accountability

👉 CALL TO ACTION

🔥 If you’re ready to build skills, confidence, and income:

👉 DM us now or apply today

👉 Limited slots available

Stop waiting for opportunity.

Start creating it.

postedCompany.description:
We are a business firm that specialises in direct recruiting for global clients from SMEs to MNCs. 


We are looking for professionals in the Sales and Marketing industry.
